A little something for today

For Vaishnavi

I know today's been a rough one. So here's a small corner of the internet, built just for you, until you're feeling more like yourself again.

↓ scroll a little

First, a check-in

How Are You, Really?

Tap whatever's closest to how you feel right now.

none 0 / 10 a lot

What would help right now?

This opens WhatsApp with a ready message — you just press send.

When it's a lot

Breathe With Me

Follow the circle. In as it grows, hold, out as it shrinks, hold. Just a minute of this can loosen the tightness a little.

Ready when you are

Just so you know

A Few Reminders

The ones you kept

Today's toolkit

Your Comfort Kit

Tap a card once you've done it — it'll check itself off.

And if the pain feels like a lot — please don't just push through it. A doctor or pharmacist can help more than the internet can.

Track your care

Feel-Better Checklist

0/6

Look at you, taking care of yourself so well today. Proud of you 💫

A few of my favourites

You, Over the Years

Tap any photo to see it bigger.

Festival-ready and absolutely glowing. ✨

Standing tall by the ghat. 🌅

Tiny you, safe in Ma's arms. 💛

Quiet confidence looks so good on you.

You and Ma — some things never change.

Make a wish, little one. 🎂

Sunshine in a yellow dress. ☀️

New ride, biggest smile. 🏍️

Already so full of grace. 🙏

Green really is your colour. 🌿

One to keep on the shelf. 💗

Sending a little heart your way.

Straight out of a fairytale. 🌸

From me, to you

A Little Note

💛
Feel better soon, Vaishnavi. Sent with care.
